jsonLd.title: RBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
